items.criterion: The PR implements KUSABI-CORE-MVP-POSTGRES-FAIL-CLOSED-001 and does not substitute backend parity, common DB, release, or publish work.
All changed files remain within the cell allowed paths, with no package, workflow, deployment, env var rename, DB path migration, docs/v2, schema, fixture, runner, or protected surface edits.
SQLite remains the default store when no PostgreSQL URL is configured.
Explicit AGENT_MEMORY_DB_TYPE=sqlite and AGENT_MEMORY_DB_TYPE=json remain local-store overrides even when a PostgreSQL URL is inherited.
AGENT_MEMORY_DATABASE_URL and legacy DATABASE_URL mean PostgreSQL intent when no explicit local store type is selected.
Configured PostgreSQL connection failure throws instead of silently writing to SQLite or JSON.
Docs describe fallback as explicit local/no-PostgreSQL-URL behavior and do not claim backend parity, common DB completion, federation, release, or publish readiness.
Diff checks, npm test, build, typecheck, and remote CI evidence are present and match the reported scope.
The PR does not authorize backend parity, common DB completion, UAMP conformance, compliance, federation, release, publish, DLP, zero-leakage, or legal/regulatory claims.
